```{r}
     arrange(desc(value)) %>%
     pull(name) %>%
     as.character()

# Convert to data frame
go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_target_df <- as.data.frame(go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_target)


# Get top GO terms per cluster 
top_go_df <- go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_target_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  top_n(-2, p.adjust) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    GeneRatio = sapply(GeneRatio, function(x) eval(parse(text = x))), 
    Description = str_wrap(Description, width = 50),
    dummy_x = "GO"
  )
top_go_df$Cluster <- factor(top_go_df$Cluster, levels = ordered_names)
top_go_df <- top_go_df[top_go_df$Count >= 2, ]


GO_mutant_SH_fru_dsx_target <- plot_go_terms_by_cluster(top_go_df, plot_title = "Top 2 GO terms mutant/CS SH fru dsx target") #Version5 axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)


GO_mutant_SH_fru_dsx_target

#All GO terms in one
dotplot(go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_target,showCategory = 2, by='GeneRatio') +
  ggtitle("GO terms Mutant/CantonS SH fru dsx target") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90,  hjust=0.5))


```




# Normalized counts for specific genes 

```{r}
GOI_counts <- c("fru", "dsx","Dsk", "tim","Clk","cry","Act5C", "betaTub56D", "RpL13A", "RpLP0","RpL21", "RpS29", "Hmt4-20", "CCT4", "TSG101")
map(GOI_counts, plot_norm_counts , dds = deseq_obj_fitted)

plot_heatmap(norm_cts_median[GOI_counts,],"GOI",  show_row_names = T, cluster_rows = F,cluster_columns = FALSE)


```


```{r}

defense <- c("CecA2", "CecC", "DptA", "Dro", "AttA", "Mtk", "BomS2", "CBP", "Tg", "SPH93", "BomBc1", "BomBc2", "DptB", "GNBP-like3", "Dso1", "BomS5", "BomT2", "BomS3", "AttC", "AttB", "PGRP-SC2", "IM18", "Dso2", "Drs")

plot_heatmap(norm_cts_median[defense,],"CS DEGs GO:0006952 defense response",  show_row_names = T, cluster_rows = F,cluster_columns = FALSE)

```



# export to csv/excel
```{r eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}
#write.csv(norm_cts, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/normalized_counts.csv")

#all_genes
writexl::write_xlsx(res_df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/all_data.xlsx")

#DEGs_housing
max_ln_DEGs_housing <- max(lengths(comp_list$housing_all_symbol))
df_fixed_DEGs_housing <- as.data.frame(do.call(cbind, lapply(comp_list$housing_all_symbol, `length<-`, max_ln_DEGs_housing)))
writexl::write_xlsx(df_fixed_DEGs_housing, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_housing.xlsx")

#DEGs_genotype_GH
max_ln_DEGs_genotype_GH <- max(lengths(comp_list$genotype_gh_all_symbol))
df_fixed_DEGs_genotype_GH <- as.data.frame(do.call(cbind, lapply(comp_list$genotype_gh_all_symbol, `length<-`, max_ln_DEGs_genotype_GH)))
writexl::write_xlsx(df_fixed_DEGs_genotype_GH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_genotype_GH.xlsx")

#DEGs_genotype_SH
max_ln_DEGs_genotype_SH <- max(lengths(comp_list$genotype_sh_all_symbol))
df_fixed_DEGs_genotype_SH <- as.data.frame(do.call(cbind, lapply(comp_list$genotype_sh_all_symbol, `length<-`, max_ln_DEGs_genotype_SH)))
writexl::write_xlsx(df_fixed_DEGs_genotype_SH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_genotype_SH.xlsx")


#GO_housing
df_GO_housing <- as.data.frame(go_housing$all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_GO_housing, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_housing.xlsx")

#GO_genotype_GH
df_GO_genotype_GH <- as.data.frame(go_genotype$gh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_GO_genotype_GH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_genotype_GH.xlsx")

#GO_genotype_SH
df_GO_genotype_SH <- as.data.frame(go_genotype$sh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_GO_genotype_SH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_genotype_SH.xlsx")


#KEGG_housing
df_KEGG_housing <- as.data.frame(KEGG_housing$all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_KEGG_housing, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/KEGG_housing.xlsx")

#KEGG_genotype_GH
df_KEGG_genotype_GH <- as.data.frame(KEGG_genotype$gh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_KEGG_genotype_GH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/KEGG_genotype_GH.xlsx")

#KEGG_genotype_SH
df_KEGG_genotype_SH <- as.data.frame(KEGG_genotype$sh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_KEGG_genotype_SH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/KEGG_genotype_SH.xlsx")


#reactome_housing
df_reactome_housing <- as.data.frame(reactome_housing$all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_reactome_housing, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/reactome_housing.xlsx")

#reactome_genotype_GH
df_reactome_genotype_GH <- as.data.frame(reactome_genotype$gh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_reactome_genotype_GH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/reactome_genotype_GH.xlsx")

#reactome_genotype_SH
df_reactome_genotype_SH <- as.data.frame(reactome_genotype$sh_all_entrezid@compareClusterResult)
writexl::write_xlsx(df_reactome_genotype_SH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/reactome_genotype_SH.xlsx")


#DEGs_with_directions_GH
writexl::write_xlsx(pairwise_log2fc_genotype_df_ashr_GH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_with_directions_GH.xlsx")

#DEGs_with_directions_SH
writexl::write_xlsx(pairwise_log2fc_genotype_df_ashr_SH, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_with_directions_SH.xlsx")

#GO_DEGs_with_directions_GH
writexl::write_xlsx(go_Ashr_sign_GH_simplify_df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_DEGs_with_directions_GH.xlsx")

#GO_DEGs_with_directions_SH
writexl::write_xlsx(go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_DEGs_with_directions_SH.xlsx")



#DEGs_with_directions_GH_target
writexl::write_xlsx(pairwise_log2fc_genotype_df_ashr_GH_target, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_with_directions_GH_target.xlsx")

#DEGs_with_directions_SH_target
writexl::write_xlsx(pairwise_log2fc_genotype_df_ashr_SH_target, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/DEGs_with_directions_SH_target.xlsx")

#GO_DEGs_with_directions_GH_target
writexl::write_xlsx(go_Ashr_sign_GH_simplify_target_df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_DEGs_with_directions_GH_target.xlsx")

#GO_DEGs_with_directions_SH_target
writexl::write_xlsx(go_Ashr_sign_SH_simplify_target_df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/GO_DEGs_with_directions_SH_target.xlsx")



#log2FC_housing
df <- as.data.frame(log2fc_mat_housing)
df <- cbind(gene = rownames(df), df)
writexl::write_xlsx(df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/log2FC_housing.xlsx")

#log2FC_genotype_GH
df <- as.data.frame(log2fc_mat_genotype_gh)
df <- cbind(gene = rownames(df), df)
writexl::write_xlsx(df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/log2FC_genotype_GH.xlsx")

#log2FC_genotype_SH
df <- as.data.frame(log2fc_mat_genotype_sh)
df <- cbind(gene = rownames(df), df)
writexl::write_xlsx(df, "../data_output/2024-1_diffexpr_output/log2FC_genotype_SH.xlsx")

```
